items.name: ⭐ Zerkiouz's 2nd Signature Shades ⭐
items.description: Top off your look with the Zerkiouz 2nd Signature Shades, a sleek and stylish hat that’s as unique as your username. Crafted with a timeless design and featuring your very own signature, these shades are the ultimate symbol of confidence and sophistication. Whether you’re exploring the Roblox world or making a statement in-game, the Zerkiouz 2nd Signature Shades ensures you stand out with class and style.

items.name: TH Monogram Backpack
items.description:
The new mark of distinction. Inspired by our heritage, but designed for tomorrow – our TH Monogram is a modern take on a time-honoured icon. The flaps and straps of this backpack contrast with the bold monogram design of the textured fabric. 

This is a collectable item. Available for 24 hours from September 11th, 4:30pm PDT.
